data.name: Sex Simulator - Pool Party
data.detailed_description:
An interactive sex simulation game with visual novel elements, featuring realistic high definition graphics and characters.
You play the role a guy spending the day at the pool with gorgeous ladies.

About the game
Enter the world of Sex Simulator - Pool Party, set by a swimming pool on a warm summer day.
Choose between 3 girls and try and make them cum in this sex simulation game.
Get to know the girls, by going through a brief visual novel like prelude.

Control the sex motion in order make the girl cum before you run out of stamina.
Choose between several types of sex (oral, normal and anal) to satisfy her. All sex scenes have different camera angles.

data.short_description: An interactive sex simulation game with visual novel elements, featuring realistic high definition graphics and characters. You play the role a guy spending the day at the pool with gorgeous ladies.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
